champion.description: Plain 6,500-sample Monte Carlo post-ReLU mean estimator; selected from B0 Mini baseline by paired confidence interval.
champion.note: Promoted after B0 Mini paired gate; independent Full gate is still required before any submission.

full_gate_partial_check.reason_partial: A single subprocess-runner pass over all 1000 Full-split MLPs measured ~58 minutes of wall time (extrapolated from a 50-MLP timing sample: 176s/50 MLPs), which exceeded the available background-task execution window twice (killed mid-run both times, including once after the one-time ~43min dataset download had already completed). Evaluated the first 500 of 1000 MLPs (deterministic dataset order) instead, within a safe duration.
full_gate_partial_check.note: Reassuring but NOT a substitute for the real Full-split gate: score (8.613e-07) and MSE (7.796e-06) are close to and even slightly better than the Mini-split champion numbers (9.39e-07 / 8.505e-06), with zero failure/budget/time flags across all 500 MLPs -- no sign of Mini-split overfitting or a broader failure mode. This does NOT satisfy AGENTS.md's 'passes the same paired gate on the independent full split' submission requirement (needs all 1000 MLPs); do not treat this as clearing that gate. A complete 1000-MLP run needs either a longer execution window than a single background task currently allows, or a proper chunk/resume mechanism (whestbench.scoring.evaluate_estimator + whestbench.runner.SubprocessRunner exist for this; not yet used here to avoid the correctness risk of hand-rolling aggregation logic under time pressure).

submissions.note: Pre-scaffold manual submission by the user. Backfill leaderboard_score from the submissions board (match by timestamp under the team names above).
